product_names: NEW AGZ: A formula for nightly restoration
notes: Imported from competitor Meta Ad Library scraper

cards.body:
🚨AGZ is here — AG1’s first-ever sleep product 🚨

Meet AGZ! Your nighttime supplement, designed to help you wind down, rest well, and wake up refreshed.*

AGZ brings together key clinically-studied ingredients like L-theanine, magnesium, ashwagandha, valerian, and saffron, all working across the three phases of nighttime restoration:

🛌 Ease into sleep*
🌙 Support restful, quality sleep*
🌅 Wake feeling renewed, not groggy*

✅No melatonin
✅No added sugar
✅No grogginess

It’s everything you trust about AG1, now, for the night.
cards.title: NEW AGZ: A formula for nightly restoration
